mapper.select: select ID ,BIZ_NO ,LOGIN ,PASSWORD ,NAME ,TEL ,EMAIL ,get_sub_code_name(ADMIN_CD) as "ADMIN_CD" ,get_sub_code_name(STATUS_CD) "STATUS_CD" ,CREATED_ON ,PW_UPDATED_ON ,get_sub_code_name(PRJ_MANAGER_CD) "PRJ_MANAGER_CD" ,get_sub_code_name(MCP_CD) "MCP_CD" from users where login = #{loginId}
